name: Street network metrics for named place
when_to_use: Measure walk or drive network size, intersection density proxy, connectivity, node/edge counts, or circuity for a named place.
verified_snippet:
import osmnx as ox

ox.settings.use_cache = True
ox.settings.requests_timeout = 60
place = '{place}'
G = ox.graph_from_place(place, network_type='walk', simplify=True)
G_proj = ox.project_graph(G)
area = ox.geocode_to_gdf(place).to_crs(G_proj.graph['crs']).geometry.area.iloc[0]
nodes = G.number_of_nodes()
edges = G.number_of_edges()
area_km2 = area / 1_000_000
print(f'nodes={nodes}')
print(f'edges={edges}')
print(f'area_km2={area_km2:.2f}')
print(f'nodes_per_km2={nodes / area_km2:.1f}')
io_contract: Input: named place and network_type. Output: node count, edge count, area_km2, nodes_per_km2. Interpret nodes_per_km2 as a rough walk-network connectivity proxy.
pitfalls: graph_from_place does not accept dist; use graph_from_point for distance buffers.
Boundary geocoding can fail for ambiguous place names; add city/country.
